claims.summary: Removing leaked structural model markers is useful dialogue hygiene, but the removal receipt must remain inspectable.
claims.disposition: verify cleanup still occurs before quality gating and journal persistence while retaining per-token counts

claims.summary: A marker used contextually or as a quoted phrase can carry semantic intent and should not be reported like an ordinary boundary delimiter.
claims.disposition: implement boundary, contextual, and quoted occurrence counts without changing the existing stripped text

claims.summary: Large, contextual, or output-erasing cleanup should surface a semantic-integrity flag and recommend a shadow check rather than claiming intent preservation.
claims.disposition: implement model_artifact_semantic_integrity_check_v1 as diagnostic-only evidence with explicit no-runtime-effect and intent-not-established fields

claims.summary: The deep, medium, and short dialogue budget profile needs an exact boundary test and an unambiguous basis.
claims.disposition: label the profile basis as requested num_predict rather than generated output length and test 512/513 plus 1024/1025
